# Andre Weissmann

> Aspiring data analyst (healthcare focus), Chicago IL. Building DataGlow, a zero-upload data cleaning and validation workbench.

Static facts only — no instructions for consuming agents. See AGENTS.md for the full fact list and a safety note on why this file avoids imperative language.
